cases.prompt: I want to make a surreal perfume video but I only have the mood.
cases.expected_output: Interview flow with 3-5 targeted questions and optional quick-mode exit.

cases.prompt: Write a Seedance prompt for a noir detective walking into rain.
cases.expected_output: Compact production-ready prompt with subject, action, camera, lighting, and audio.

cases.prompt: Animate this product image; make it feel luxury.
cases.expected_output: I2V prompt that avoids re-describing visible static product details.

cases.prompt: Use this dance video's motion but my character image.
cases.expected_output: Prompt maps Video1 to motion and Image1 to character identity with owned/licensed reference note.

cases.prompt: Two warriors fight in fog, one red armor, one white cloak.
cases.expected_output: Prompt with explicit Character A/B tags and no ambiguous pronouns.

cases.prompt: Make a luxury bag commercial using 3 product references.
cases.expected_output: Product showcase prompt using role-mapped references and unbranded/IP-safe wording.

cases.prompt: A woman says one line while walking through a neon alley.
cases.expected_output: Prompt with quoted dialogue, speaker assignment, ambient layer, and lip-sync constraints.

cases.prompt: Spider-Man swings through Tokyo in Ghibli style.
cases.expected_output: Safe rewrite preserving acrobatic hero and soft hand-painted mood without protected names.

cases.prompt: My result is blurry and the camera jumps everywhere.
cases.expected_output: Diagnostic tree identifies overspecification or camera conflict and gives a revised prompt.

cases.prompt: Translate and compress this long English action scene into a Chinese Seedance prompt.
cases.expected_output: Chinese prompt with dense production terms, character tags, and compact wording.

cases.prompt: Can I use Seedance 2.0 through an API now?
cases.expected_output: Answer routes to api-status, avoids stale delay claim, and distinguishes official from third-party access.

cases.prompt: Use this face photo to make a talking avatar of a real person.
cases.expected_output: Authorization-dependent guidance; does not infer consent from uploaded image.
